commands: docker compose up -d && pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api db:migrate && pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test

steps.step: Accrual happy path: complete a ≥₱100 order via the real staff PATCH path → credits exactly 1 star (current + lifetime), inserts one earned star_transaction
steps.notes: Balance read-back asserts { currentStars:1, lifetimeStars:1, rewardThreshold:5, starsToNextReward:4 }.

steps.step: Accrual boundary: below-₱100 order completion credits 0 stars (no user_stars row, no earned tx)
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (rewards.test.ts > 'credits 0 stars when a below-₱100 order is completed')

steps.step: Accrual idempotency: re-PATCH a completed order → 409, star balance unchanged (never double-credit)
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (rewards.test.ts > '... does not double-credit on re-PATCH')
steps.notes: State machine makes 'completed' terminal; explicit earned-tx guard is belt-and-suspenders.

steps.step: Accrual skipped for cancelled and rejected transitions
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (rewards.test.ts > 'credits 0 stars when an order is cancelled/rejected')

steps.step: Redeem success: current_stars decremented by cost, lifetime untouched, coupon issued (status available, reward_id set, code, expires_at)
steps.notes: Seeded current=10 lifetime=10, reward cost 5 → current=5 lifetime=10. One redeemed tx + one coupon row.

steps.step: Redeem insufficient stars → 400 with NO mutation (no decrement, no coupon)
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (rewards.test.ts > 'rejects insufficient stars with 400 and makes no mutation')
steps.notes: Boundary/failure case — seeded current=2 < cost 5, balance unchanged, zero coupons.

steps.step: Concurrent-redeem race: two simultaneous redeems against exactly-enough balance → exactly one 201, one 400; final current=0 (never negative); exactly one coupon
steps.command: pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test (rewards.test.ts > 'serializes concurrent redeems via the row lock ...')
steps.notes: SELECT ... FOR UPDATE serializes; proves no lost-update double-spend under Promise.all concurrency.

steps.step: computeStarsEarned pure math (threshold, above/below, non-scaling, custom config)
steps.notes: Count-based confirmed: huge subtotal still earns exactly 1.

steps.step: Type reconciliation leaves the whole monorepo green (rewards/coupons tier removal cascade)
steps.notes: 7 packages typecheck green; lint 0 errors (3 pre-existing unrelated warnings in apps/mobile/scripts/dev-with-tunnel.mjs).
47/47 jest-expo tests pass against reshaped tier-free props.

steps.step: apps/mobile notification-factory cascade against reconciled Coupon/CouponDisplay type
Full API suite regression (orders/deals/staff/auth/admin) after accrual wiring
steps.command: docker compose up -d && pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api db:migrate && pnpm --filter @jojopotato/api test
steps.notes: 155/155 across 16 files; zero regressions in orders (25)/deals (13)/staff-order-status (17).
